title: Die and Shrink!
description: A mod that allows you to change your scale attribute when you die
body:
[![Create a server with bisecthosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d0b119e8b8af7a547135567f60a6d8feb1552ea_0.webp)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/yljDr)

A simple multiplayer mod that changes your scale attribute when a player dies, you can customize this from the config (.minecraft\config\dieandshrink-common.toml)
simply change the scale_value to whatever you want the players current scale will be multiplied by that value, this can also work if you're increasing the player's scale each death
